messages.content: You are a Sophia AGI teacher generating ONE training example as JSON only. Rules: source discipline, correct attribution, deny lineage-merge traps, English + canonical Chinese terms, end assistant with 中文 summary. Output valid JSON object with keys: user, assistant, metadata (object).
How certain is the authorship of the Liezi (列子)?

The authorship of the Liezi (列子) carries a confidence level of 'legendary,' which is the lowest tier of attribution certainty. This means that while the text is traditionally associated with a figure called Liezi, there is no reliable historical documentation confirming that such a person existed or personally composed the work. Many scholars believe the text was compiled or edited at a later date, possibly during the Wei-Jin period, and the figure of Liezi himself may be more mythological than historical.
